name: Skill request
about: Suggest a skill to add to the catalogue
labels: skill-request
---

## Skill details

**Upstream repo:** <!-- https://github.com/owner/repo -->
**Stars:** <!-- approximate -->
**Last commit:** <!-- e.g. "2 weeks ago" -->

## Install method

<!-- How is the full skill installed? tick the one that applies -->
- [ ] `npx skills add owner/repo` — standard `npx skills` install
- [ ] `npx skills add owner/repo --skill <name>` — named skill within a package
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Suggested metadata

```yaml
type:     # skill | package | platform
tier:     # official | community | experimental
rank:     # 1 (best in class) | 2 (solid coverage) | 3 (niche/extended)
category: # see valid categories below
```

**Valid categories:** `design-systems` · `creative-3d` · `interaction-polish` · `visual-components` · `accessibility-quality` · `design-review` · `figma-code` · `official-suites` · `diagrams` · `data-visualization` · `presentations` · `product-pm` · `content-design` · `email-design` · `tui-terminal` · `motion-animation` · `design-engineering` · `design-research`

## Why add it

<!-- One sentence: what gap does this fill that nothing in the catalogue already covers? -->
